>Synopsis:	Re: kern/129022: [ath] ath cannot connect using WEP

>Release:	8-CURRENT
>Environment:	FreeBSD moshnroll 8.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 8.0-CURRENT #11 r185532M: Mon Dec  1 23:16:26 CET 2008     root@moshnroll:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/ARUNDEL  i386
>Description:
i rebuild the kernel yesterday with fresh sources. i'm still unable to connect to my router using wep. so the recent changes in ath (new open source ath_hal e.g.) didn't fix this issue.

cheers.
